config.sunbathing.sun_intensity.tooltip: Strength of the sun's god rays.
config.sunbathing.moon_intensity.tooltip: Strength of the moon's god rays.
config.sunbathing.quality.tooltip: Samples per ray. Higher is smoother but costs more.
config.sunbathing.density.tooltip: How far the rays reach from the light source.
config.sunbathing.decay.tooltip: How quickly rays fade along their length.
config.sunbathing.lens_flare.tooltip: Intensity of the screen-space lens flare (0 = off).
config.sunbathing.clouds_enabled.tooltip: Draw procedural clouds on the sky.
config.sunbathing.cloud_coverage.tooltip: How much of the sky the clouds cover.
config.sunbathing.cloud_density.tooltip: Higher makes cloud edges harder and more solid.
config.sunbathing.cloud_scale.tooltip: Size of the cloud pattern. Lower is bigger, puffier clouds.
config.sunbathing.cloud_speed.tooltip: How fast the clouds drift across the sky.
